text.title: Instagram Ads Playbook Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding the instagram-ads methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Reels MUST be the primary placement; ≥60% of budget allocated to Reels for cold acquisition.
rule.rationale: Reels delivers 30-50% lower CPM and 2-3x watch time vs Stories/Feed on IG.

rule.statement: Cold acquisition creative MUST be UGC or creator-led, not polished brand video.
rule.rationale: UGC + creator content outperforms brand-polished by 2-4x on IG cold CTR.

rule.statement: Primary creative MUST be 9:16. 1:1 and 4:5 ship as derivatives, never lead.
rule.rationale: 9:16 covers Reels + Stories + Feed (cropped); leading with 1:1 forfeits Reels.

rule.statement: IG frequency cap MUST be 3/wk per user for cold; 5/wk for retargeting. Above that CTR drops sharply.
rule.rationale: IG users tolerate less frequency than FB users; lower cap protects CPM.

rule.statement: Ecom IG campaigns MUST use Shopping tags + product feed; tag-less ads forfeit free CTA + product detail surface.
rule.rationale: Shopping tags lift ecom CTR 20-40% and surface product page on tap.
